Vfn^, 1T5^ Hf^ MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health tod Family Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th August, 2008 S.0.2130(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by nib-section (1) Section 7, Sub-*ectkrn (2) of Section 8, Section 10 and Section 31 of the Cigarettes and Other Tobacco Products (Prohibition of Advertisement and Regulation of Trade and Commerce, Production, Supply and Distribution) Act, 2003 (34 of 2003), the Central Government hereby appoints 30th day ofNovember, 2008 as the date on which the Cigarettes and Other products (Packaging and Labeling) Rules, 2008 notified vide No. G.SJL 182(E), dated 156 March, 2008. shall come into farce.
